summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 25 open pull requests. No shared canonical was selected. Most PRs remain independent backlog items; two PRs with explicit boundary-bypass/sensitive-data claims are routed to central security handling. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and fix/merge/low-signal closeout are disabled.
